title: 15-minute view
excerpt: Allow for a 15-minute view on the calendar widget.

posts.author: DavidSchenkler (David Schenkler | monday ambassador cohort 7)
posts.cookedHtml: Allow for a 15-minute view on the calendar widget.

posts.author: reinier (Reinier ― 📅 Calendar Plus 🍅 Automato)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi David,

I definitely agree that should be a basic functionality. If you’re open to using marketplace apps, Calendar Plus has 15- and even 5-minute views.

–

posts.author: DavidSchenkler (David Schenkler | monday ambassador cohort 7)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Reinier,
Thanks for letting me know, but I’m a bit of a Monday-purist, so I try to stay away from apps as much as possible unless it’s absolutely necessary. This isn’t, so I hope it becomes available at some point.
